name: Blue Yonder Supply Chain Platform API
what_it_does: Blue Yonder (formerly JDA Software) REST API for AI-driven supply chain management platform. Enables AI agents to manage demand forecasting and planning for supply chain demand sensing, handle inventory optimization and replenishment for multi-echelon inventory management, access fulfillment and order orchestration for omnichannel order management, retrieve transportation management and carrier execution data for logistics automation, manage warehouse management and labor optimization for distribution center operations, access supply chain analytics and visibility data for operational intelligence, handle supplier collaboration and replenishment workflow for supply network management, retrieve retail space planning and category management data for retail execution, manage lumpy demand and promotion planning for consumer goods supply chain, and integrate Blue Yonder supply chain data with SAP, Oracle, and ERP systems.
use_cases: Automating demand forecasts from supply planning agents
Optimizing inventory replenishment from supply chain agents
Orchestrating fulfillment from omnichannel order agents
Managing carrier selection from transportation agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise supply chain complexity
Simple inventory management without multi-echelon optimization
Manufacturing without supply chain planning integration needs
best_when: A large retailer, consumer goods manufacturer, or 3PL using Blue Yonder wants AI agents to automate demand planning, inventory optimization, fulfillment orchestration, and transportation management.
avoid_when: SUPPLY CHAIN RISK: Blue Yonder AI demand planning produces probabilistic forecasts — automated replenishment orders based on forecasts without demand signal validation can create overstock or stockout situations. Transportation management automation must validate carrier capacity commitments before booking; automated tender without availability check creates carrier rejection. Blue Yonder Luminate platform migration from on-premises JDA creates API surface differences for legacy customers.

auth.notes: Blue Yonder uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.blueyonder.com. Webhooks for supply chain events. REST API with JSON. Scottsdale, Arizona HQ. Panasonic acquired Blue Yonder (2021, $8.5B). Formerly JDA Software (rebranded Blue Yonder 2020). JDA acquired Manugistics (2010) and i2 Technologies (2010). 3,000+ enterprise supply chain customers. Strong in retail, consumer goods, and 3PL. Competes with o9 Solutions, Kinaxis, and SAP IBP for enterprise supply chain planning.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by module and transaction volume
pricing.notes: Scottsdale, Arizona. Blue Yonder (formerly JDA). Panasonic acquisition 2021 ($8.5B). 3,000+ supply chain customers. Strong in retail and consumer goods. Panasonic supply chain integration focus post-acquisition. Competes with o9 Solutions, Kinaxis, and SAP IBP for enterprise supply chain planning and execution.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: SUPPLY CHAIN RISK: AI demand forecast automation without human demand signal validation creates overstock or stockout; Blue Yonder ML models require ongoing training data quality management
JDA to Blue Yonder API migration — legacy JDA on-premises customers have different API surfaces than Luminate cloud customers; verify customer deployment model
Panasonic acquisition alignment — Panasonic ownership focuses Blue Yonder on manufacturing and electronics supply chain; roadmap and support investment may shift toward Panasonic verticals
Transportation tender automation — automated carrier tender without capacity validation creates carrier rejection cycles; TMS automation must handle tender fallback logic
Promotion demand lift — consumer goods promotion events create demand spikes; automated forecasting without promotion calendar integration under-forecasts during promotions
Multi-echelon inventory complexity — Blue Yonder multi-echelon optimization produces inventory position recommendations that require validation before automated replenishment orders
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise supply chain. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Supply chain planning and inventory data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supply chain platform. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Supply chain and inventory data.
